change_notes: Removed erroneous particles 'Caecilius Secundus' from name_particles; corrected family_name to 'Plinius' only; moved 'Caecilius Secundus' to name_suffix as cognomen elements following the main name
Removed 'von' from name_particles; 'von' is not a particle for Robert Ranke-Graves (Robert Graves), whose hyphenated surname 'Ranke-Graves' contains no connective particle
Moved 'Graf' from name_particles to name_prefix as it is a noble title/honorific, not a connective particle
Split 'Pico Della Mirandola': 'Pico' to family_name, 'della' to name_particles, 'Mirandola' to name_suffix as territorial designation
Moved 'Dr.' from name_particles to name_prefix where it belongs as an honorific title
Moved 'van' from given_names to name_particles; removed 'van' from given_names leaving 'Willard Orman'
Moved 'Graf' from name_particles to name_prefix as it is a title/honorific, not a connective particle
Single historical name with epithet 'der Jüngere'; moved full name to single_name, cleared family_name and name_particles as this is a single-name historical figure
Moved 'Sir' from name_particles to name_prefix as it is an honorific title, not a connective particle
Separated 'Graf von' in name_particles: moved 'Graf' to name_suffix (noble title) and kept 'von' as the connective particle
Corrected capitalization of 'Y' to 'y' in family_name (Spanish conjunction 'y' is lowercase)
Separated 'Fürst von' in name_particles: moved 'Fürst' (noble title/rank) to name_suffix, kept only connective particle 'von' in name_particles
Paracelsus is a single mononym/pseudonym; moved to single_name, cleared family_name and given_names
